dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement

Class JkModuleId

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.JkModuleId
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.util.Comparator<JkModuleId>

    public final class JkModuleId
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.util.Comparator<JkModuleId>
    Identify a module (such as Google Guava). in a binary repository (such as a Maren repository). The module is identified by a group and a name which are both mandatory. Each module have generally many versions, and each version may contain many artifacts (which are identified using JkCoordinate).

      Creates a module id according the specified group and name.
      java.lang.String toColonNotation()
      A concatenation of the group and name of this module as '[group]:[value]'.
      JkCoordinate toCoordinate()
      Creates a JkCoordinate from this moduleId with unspecified version.

      Creates a JkCoordinate from this moduleId with the specified version.

      Creates a JkCoordinate from this moduleId with the specified version.

    • Method Detail

      • of

        public static JkModuleId of(java.lang.String group,
                            java.lang.String name)
        Creates a module id according the specified group and name.

      • of

        public static JkModuleId of(java.lang.String moduleId)
        Creates a module id according a string supposed to be formatted as group.name or group: name. The last '.' is considered as the separator between the group and the name.
        If there is no '.' then the whole string will serve both for group and name.

      • getGroup

        public java.lang.String getGroup()
        Group of this module.

      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName()
        Name of this module.

      • getDotNotation

        public java.lang.String getDotNotation()
        A concatenation of the group and name of the module as '[group].[name]'.

      • toColonNotation

        public java.lang.String toColonNotation()
        A concatenation of the group and name of this module as '[group]:[value]'.

      • toCoordinate

        public JkCoordinate toCoordinate(java.lang.String version)
        Creates a JkCoordinate from this moduleId with the specified version.

      • toCoordinate

        Creates a JkCoordinate from this moduleId with the specified version.

      • toCoordinate
